name: Independent Producer and Royalty Owner Exemption

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must not be a 'retailer' or 'refiner' as defined in Section 613A(d). The deduction is limited to 100% of taxable income from the property.

description: Allows independent producers and royalty owners to claim a 15% percentage depletion deduction on domestic crude oil and natural gas production, up to 1,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day.
